requirement_topic.en: BSTI Standards and Compulsory Scope Due Diligence

summary.en: BSTI is Bangladesh's national standards and conformity-assessment authority under the Bangladesh Standards and Testing Institution Act, 2018. The Power Division of Bangladesh has issued an Electric Vehicle Charging Guideline that makes BSTI certification mandatory for all EV charging stations. Confirm the current guideline version, applicable BDS or IEC standard citation, and HS-code coverage for the exact charger model before export.
summary.zh: 依据《孟加拉国标准与测试机构法，2018》，BSTI是孟加拉国国家标准和合格评定主管机构。孟加拉国电力司已发布《电动汽车充电指南》，规定所有电动汽车充电站须取得BSTI认证。出口前应确认现行指南版本、适用的BDS或IEC标准引用，以及所涵盖的具体充电设备型号的HS编码范围。
summary.zht: 依據《孟加拉國標準與測試機構法，2018》，BSTI是孟加拉國國家標準和合格評定主管機構。孟加拉國電力司已發布《電動汽車充電指南》，規定所有電動汽車充電站須取得BSTI認證。出口前應確認現行指南版本、適用的BDS或IEC標準引用，以及所涵蓋的具體充電設備型號的HS編碼範圍。

standards_or_laws: Bangladesh Standards and Testing Institution Act, 2018
Power Division Electric Vehicle Charging Guideline (Bangladesh) — mandates BSTI certification for all EV charging stations
BSTI Bangladesh Standards and certification-mark framework
BSTI import-clearance or compulsory-list route where applicable

summary.en: China GB/T charger reports and China CCC or voluntary certification files can support technical review, but they do not prove Bangladesh BSTI adoption, import clearance, or mandatory status for the exact charger.
summary.zh: 中国GB/T充电设备报告以及中国CCC或自愿认证文件可支持技术审查，但不能证明孟加拉国BSTI已采标、已准予进口清关或具体充电设备具有强制状态。
summary.zht: 中國GB/T充電設備報告以及中國CCC或自願認證文件可支持技術審查，但不能證明孟加拉國BSTI已採標、已准予進口清關或具體充電設備具有強制狀態。

standards_or_laws: CNCA-C25-01 for China EV supply equipment where applicable

gap.en: Before quoting a Bangladesh market-access claim, identify the exact BDS, IEC adoption, compulsory-list item, import policy condition, tender clause, or BSTI decision that applies to the model.
gap.zh: 在作出孟加拉国市场准入声明前，应识别适用于该型号的准确BDS、IEC采标、强制清单项目、进口政策条件、招标条款或BSTI决定。
gap.zht: 在作出孟加拉國市場准入聲明前，應識別適用於該型號的準確BDS、IEC採標、強制清單項目、進口政策條件、招標條款或BSTI決定。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for EV charging stations under the Power Division Electric Vehicle Charging Guideline (Bangladesh) which requires BSTI certification; confirm current guideline version, applicable BDS/IEC standard, and exact charger scope before export
mandatory_status.cn: China evidence does not determine Bangladesh BSTI compulsory status

source.title: Power Division, Ministry of Power, Energy and Mineral Resources — Electric Vehicle Charging Guideline (Bangladesh)
source.publisher: Power Division, Ministry of Power, Energy and Mineral Resources, Bangladesh

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] The Power Division EV Charging Guideline mandates BSTI certification for all EV charging stations in Bangladesh. Confirm the applicable BDS or IEC standard edition, HS code coverage, and current BSTI test-lab availability for the exact charger model.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 孟加拉国电力司《电动汽车充电指南》规定所有电动汽车充电站须取得BSTI认证。应确认适用的BDS或IEC标准版本、HS编码覆盖范围，以及BSTI对具体充电设备型号的当前检测实验室可用性。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 孟加拉國電力司《電動汽車充電指南》規定所有電動汽車充電站須取得BSTI認證。應確認適用的BDS或IEC標準版本、HS編碼覆蓋範圍，以及BSTI對具體充電設備型號的當前檢測實驗室可用性。

summary.en: Where Bangladesh projects, utilities, buyers, or a BSTI route request IEC-family evidence, IEC 61851-1 is the core conductive EV supply equipment standard for operating conditions, the EVSE-to-vehicle connection, and electrical-safety requirements. Use the bare IEC 61851 number unless a Bangladesh-adopted BDS IEC edition is confirmed for the exact project.
summary.zh: 当孟加拉国项目、公用事业、买方或BSTI路径要求IEC体系证据时，IEC 61851-1是电动汽车传导供电设备运行条件、EVSE与车辆连接以及电气安全要求的核心标准。除非已确认具体项目采用的孟加拉国BDS IEC版本，否则应使用裸IEC 61851编号。
summary.zht: 當孟加拉國專案、公用事業、買方或BSTI路徑要求IEC體系證據時，IEC 61851-1是電動汽車傳導供電設備運行條件、EVSE與車輛連接以及電氣安全要求的核心標準。除非已確認具體專案採用的孟加拉國BDS IEC版本，否則應使用裸IEC 61851編號。

standards_or_laws: IEC 61851-23:2023 (Ed.2 — DC EV supply equipment; the current IEC edition as of the date of review; a Bangladesh BDS IEC 61851-23 adoption has been reported but was not confirmed from BSTI official sources — verify with BSTI before citing a specific BDS edition)
BDS IEC 61851 edition only where confirmed by BSTI or project documents

summary.en: China commonly uses GB/T 18487.1 for conductive charging system general requirements, supported by GB/T 20234 connector and GB/T 27930 DC communication files. These are useful baselines but should be mapped clause by clause before being presented as IEC evidence.
summary.zh: 中国通常采用GB/T 18487.1作为传导充电系统通用要求，并配套GB/T 20234连接装置和GB/T 27930直流通信文件。这些文件是有用基线，但在作为IEC证据提交前应逐条映射。
summary.zht: 中國通常採用GB/T 18487.1作為傳導充電系統通用要求，並配套GB/T 20234連接裝置和GB/T 27930直流通訊文件。這些文件是有用基線，但在作為IEC證據提交前應逐條映射。

gap.en: Prepare a clause matrix for protection, control pilot, earthing, insulation, marking, installation instructions, environmental ratings, abnormal-operation behavior, and DC-station functions. Retest or supplement evidence where Bangladesh project requirements call for IEC reports.
gap.zh: 应为保护、控制导引、接地、绝缘、标识、安装说明、环境等级、异常运行行为和直流站功能准备条款矩阵。孟加拉国项目要求IEC报告时，应重新测试或补充证据。
gap.zht: 應為保護、控制導引、接地、絕緣、標識、安裝說明、環境等級、異常運行行為和直流站功能準備條款矩陣。孟加拉國專案要求IEC報告時，應重新測試或補充證據。

mandatory_status.target: Project and scope-dependent; IEC 61851 evidence is mandatory only where BSTI, a utility, a tender, a buyer specification, or an installation approval route requires it
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 18487 evidence is China-side baseline evidence and is not direct Bangladesh IEC acceptance evidence

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat IEC 61851 as the Bangladesh-facing technical benchmark only where the project or authority route calls it up; China GB/T 18487 files need mapping and possible retesting.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 仅在项目或主管机关路径引用时，才应将IEC 61851作为面向孟加拉国的技术基准；中国GB/T 18487文件需要映射并可能需要重测。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 僅在專案或主管機關路徑引用時，才應將IEC 61851作為面向孟加拉國的技術基準；中國GB/T 18487文件需要映射並可能需要重測。
